title: First Fleet (disambiguation)
content:
First Fleet can refer to:
*The [[Confederate First Fleet|First Fleet]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
*The [[New Republic First Fleet|First Battle Group]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
*The [[Galactic Alliance First Fleet|First Fleet]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]].
{{Disambig}}
